channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Trump’s New Nuclear Architecture for Modernization and Arms Control
item.description: The Trump administration recently announced a new architecture for nuclear policy, which includes an enduring commitment to nuclear modernization and arms control. The United States can expand and diversify its nuclear arsenal and work toward nuclear risk reduction measures.

item.title: Trump May Seize Iran’s Nuclear Stockpile: Why Airstrikes Alone Aren’t Enough
item.description: Air strikes are not sufficient to neutralize Iran’s nuclear threat. Post Operation Epic Fury, President Trump is weighing options to secure the remaining stockpile, with the Department of Defense moving assets into the region to enable a potential seizure operation.

item.title: Iran War Cost Estimate Update: $11.3 Billion at Day 6, $16.5 Billion at Day 12
item.description: This update uses the DOD-reported $11.3 billion war cost to calculate the impact on munition inventories. It also estimates the cost of combat losses and damage to bases ($1.7 billion) and the total cost over 12 days of Epic Fury ($16.5 billion).
